text: Being here, I feel a quiet curiosity. This brightly lit, modern space—part exhibition, part workspace—radiates a sense of anticipation and innovation. The words on the wall, 'R+D', suggest experimentation and the pursuit of new knowledge. There is a hum of potential collaboration in the air, a gentle encouragement to contemplate how technology and design shape the world. I feel as if I'm witnessing the threshold of future ideas.
